ddls:
CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the match */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the away team */,
  "home_score" INTEGER /* Score of the home team */,
  "away_score" INTEGER /* Score of the away team */,
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tournament */,
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the venue */,
  "neutral" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the match was played in a neutral location */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the tournament */,
  "match_status" TEXT /* Status of the match (e.g., scheduled, in progress, completed) */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators at the match */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the match */,
  "referee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the referee officiating the match */,
  "stadium_capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the stadium */,
  "live_updates" INTEGER /* Indicates if live updates are available for the match */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_home_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_tournament_id FOREIGN KEY ("tournament_id") REFERENCES tournaments ("tournament_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_away_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("away_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_venue_id FOREIGN KEY ("venue_id") REFERENCES venues ("venue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country the team represents */,
  "fifa_code" TEXT /* FIFA code for the team */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Name of the team's coach */,
  "founded" TEXT /* Year the team was founded */,
  "team_logo_url" TEXT /* URL of the team's logo */,
  "team_colors" TEXT /* Primary and secondary colors of the team */,
  "team_ranking" INTEGER /* Current FIFA ranking of the team */,
  "number_of_players" INTEGER /* Number of players in the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tournaments" (
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tournament */,
  "tournament_name" TEXT /* Name of the tournament */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the tournament */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the tournament */,
  "host_country" TEXT /* Host country of the tournament */,
  "tournament_type" TEXT /* Type of tournament */,
  "number_of_teams" INTEGER /* Number of teams participating in the tournament */,
  "winner_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the winning team */,
  "runner_up_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the runner-up team */,
  "third_place_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the third-place team */,
  "fourth_place_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fourth-place team */,
  "total_matches_played" INTEGER /* Total number of matches played in the tournament */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tournament_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tournaments_fourth_place_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("fourth_place_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tournaments_third_place_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("third_place_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tournaments_winner_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("winner_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tournaments_runner_up_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("runner_up_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "venues" (
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each venue */,
  "venue_name" TEXT /* Name of the venue */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the venue is located */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the venue is located */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the venue */,
  "coordinates" TEXT /* Coordinates of the venue (latitude, longitude) */,
  "stadium_type" TEXT /* Type of stadium */,
  "stadium_opened" TEXT /* Year the stadium was opened */,
  "stadium_renovated" TEXT /* Year the stadium was last renovated */,
  "stadium_website" TEXT /* URL of the stadium's official website */,
  "stadium_seating_type" TEXT /* Type of seating */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("venue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst, fan) */,
  "language" TEXT /* Preferred language of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "is_admin" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user has administrative privileges */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the match data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the match data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the system */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the system */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access in seconds */,
  "access_device" TEXT /* Type of device used to access the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
